text: my check engine light has been on so long i consider it a feature now
neighbor mows his lawn at 7am on saturdays. i hope his pillow is always warm
added sriracha to cereal once as a kid and honestly it wasnt that bad
parallel parked perfectly today and nobody saw it. devastating
my upstairs neighbor is either doing jumping jacks or fighting a bear at 2am
ate my roommates leftovers again. if he labels them i will simply not read it
used a coupon that expired in 2019 and the cashier just let it happen
reported my neighbor for having their trash cans out too long. no regrets
i have 347 spotify playlists and listen to the same 12 songs
skipped leg day once in 2014 and my quads have never forgiven me
my car makes a new sound every week like its learning to speak
texted my ex 'you up' at 3am. it was my boss. different contact same energy
my cat knocked my coffee off the desk and stared at me like i deserved it
netflix removed the only show i watched. paying $20 to stare at a menu now
my apartment walls are so thin i know my neighbors wifi password from hearing him say it
used to eat sand at the playground. built different honestly
my dog ate my airpod and now he connects to my phone via bluetooth
every streaming service wants $15/mo. im back to pirating like its 2008
drunk me venmo'd a stranger $50 with the note 'for your troubles'. who is kevin
my neighbor put up a ring camera pointed at my door. cold war has begun
tried to jump my car with youtube instructions and now neither car works
as a child i genuinely believed the moon followed our car home
my apartment lease says no pets but my roaches pay rent too at this point
hulu has ads on the paid version. this is violence
texted 'i love you' to the pizza delivery guy by accident. he said thanks
my mechanic called my car 'brave' for still running. thats not reassuring
neighbor keeps stealing my amazon packages. jokes on him its all cat food
used to think the hazard lights button in the car was a self destruct button
my hamster escaped and i found him in the kitchen cabinet eating pasta
paying for 4 streaming services and still nothing to watch on a friday night
my apartment has a 'vintage' oven meaning it might explode any day
drunk texted my landlord asking if rent was optional this month. it is not
my neighbors kid keeps ringing my doorbell and running away. hes 34
car broke down on the highway and i just sat there accepting my fate
used to microwave ants with a magnifying glass. i turned out mostly fine
my dog howls at the roomba like its a home invader every single day
disney plus raised the price again. walt is rolling in his cryogenic chamber
sent my boss a meme at 1am that said 'mood' and it was a picture of a dumpster
the apartment above me has a treadmill. they only use it at midnight
my tire pressure light is on but so is my will to ignore problems
neighbor asked me to watch their plant. its dead. ive been watering a fake plant
i remember eating glue sticks in kindergarten and i remember them being good
my parrot learned to say 'alexa order seeds' and now i have 12 bags of birdseed
cancelled cable for streaming now i pay more for worse service. progress
drunk me signed up for a marathon. sober me has never run a mile
my neighbor plays saxophone badly at 9pm. technically legal. emotionally criminal
took my car to the mechanic and he laughed. not a good sign
as a kid i called 911 to ask what time it was. cops came to my house
my fish watches me eat dinner every night and judges me. i can feel it
peacock streaming exists apparently. who asked for this
texted my mom 'lets rage tonight' meant for my friend. she said yes
my apartment bathroom has no fan. every shower is a steam room experience
my cars ac only works on the highway. city driving is a sauna
neighbor leaves passive aggressive notes on my door in comic sans. psychopath behavior
used to think quicksand would be a much bigger problem in adult life
my rabbit chewed through my laptop charger. third one this month
amazon prime video UI was designed by someone who hates joy
drunk ordered 47 dollars of taco bell on uber eats. the shame was free
upstairs neighbor dropped something heavy at 3am and yelled sorry through the floor
my brakes make a sound like a whale singing. mechanic says its fine
neighbor has 14 garden gnomes. every week theres a new one. where do they come from
i used to think banks just gave you free money. what a beautiful time
my cat sits on my keyboard during zoom calls and has better attendance than me
every streaming service is making their own shows now and none of them are good
sent a voice note to my ex at 2am. it was just me eating chips
my apartment elevator has been broken for 6 months. i live on the 9th floor. cardio i guess
my windshield wiper fluid is empty so i just drive in the rain to clean it
neighbor put up a fence between our yards. best day of my life honestly
thought the tooth fairy was a real career path until i was like 9
my turtle escaped his tank and i found him 3 days later behind the fridge. legend
hbo max changed its name again. nobody knows what its called anymore
drunk me left a yelp review for my own apartment. 2 stars generous
someone in my building microwaves fish every day at noon. we live in a society
my car door only opens from the outside. i climb in through passenger side like a hero
neighbor waters his driveway. just the driveway. every morning. why
i genuinely believed chocolate milk came from brown cows until embarrassingly late
my gecko stares at me from his tank with the energy of a disappointed father
paying for youtube premium because the ads broke me. they won
texted my dentist 'miss u' at midnight. auto filled from 'miss u mom'. still weird
the fire alarm in my apartment goes off every time i boil water. every time
my transmission is slipping but so is my grip on reality so we match
neighbor asked me to stop singing in the shower. i didnt know they could hear me
used to stand in front of the microwave thinking itd give me superpowers
my dog learned to open the fridge. we are no longer equals in this household
paramount plus sounds like a credit card not a streaming service
drunk me RSVPd yes to a wedding for someone i dont even know. going tho
my shower has two temperatures: ice and lava. there is no middle ground
my muffler fell off in a walmart parking lot and i just kept driving
neighbor leaves their christmas lights up all year. respect the commitment honestly
thought you could pause online games. ruined many family dinners arguing this
my snake got loose once and my roommate didnt come home for a week
apple tv has like 4 shows and charges you for vibes
woke up to a drunk text i sent that just said 'bees?' to 11 people
my heater sounds like a helicopter taking off. cozy
car insurance quoted me like i was a danger to society. maybe fair
neighbor borrowed my drill 8 months ago. at this point its his drill
ate a crayon in 2nd grade on a dare and won a fruit rollup. worth it
my lizard escaped during a party and someone screamed so loud the cops came
crunchyroll wants me to pay AND watch ads. bold strategy
sent my professor 'lol ok boomer' meant for group chat. dropped the class
